description: Separate polygons into sets. Individual sets are created out of each group of polygons that fit the desired separation criteria. For instance, a geometry set containing two polygons are split into two separate geometry sets. The geometry set names will be s with an integer count appended (e.g., if s = fred , then one set will be named fred1 and the other will be fred2 ). If the set keyword is not given, then the current set is used.

keywords.name: by-closed-volume
keywords.description: Attempts to separate polygons into collections that form closed watertight volumes.

keywords.name: by-connected
keywords.description: Separates polygons into collections that are connected across edges.

keywords.name: by-group
keywords.description: Separates polygons into collections sharing the same group name. Note that polygons may end up in multiple sets if they share group names in multiple slots.

keywords.name: by-closed-volume
keywords.description: Attempts to separate polygons into collections that form closed watertight volumes.

keywords.name: by-connected
keywords.description: Separates polygons into collections that are connected across edges.

keywords.name: by-group
keywords.description: Separates polygons into collections sharing the same group name. Note that polygons may end up in multiple sets if they share group names in multiple slots.

keywords.name: name
keywords.description: Name of output geometry sets. If not given they will start with the name of the geometry set that is separated.

keywords.name: set
keywords.description: Specify the geometry set to separate.
